creator: mpietrzak@itspro.com.pl
text:
ITS Pro is on the market since 2013 based in Poland, focused on consultancy and advisory services and delivery customized systems and applications, monitoring IT systems, messaging systems for our customers from various sectors and countries.

We work in following applications based on FreeBSD platform: messaging systems - postfix, monitoring systems – nagios, secure publishing internet access to back office applications and services (reverse proxy) like Exchange, SharePoint.

Feel free to contact us to learn how you can benefit from our knowledge, experience and passion in it technology.
